notes: Externally measured from Claude Code session JSONL logs. raw_durable_state_kb updated to byte-exact total from paper Section 4.1.1: identity scaffold 6.5 KB (SOUL.md 0.9 + self_rules.md 5.6) + operational scaffold 18.4 KB (CLAUDE.md) + context scaffold 662.5 KB (memory/ 311.6 + state/ 264.7 + cache/ 86.2) = 687.4 KB. compressed_startup_scaffold_kb = 47.3 KB represents the operationally loaded subset: CLAUDE.md (~18.4 KB, always in context as system prompt) + mean orientation file reads (~29 KB per TFPA dataset). TFPA median 35.9s across 119 cycles (60s used here as conservative representative). 7 plan revisions = typical orientation phase. Burst ratio 1.2 means slight orientation overhead.

scaffold_efficiency.notes: Longitudinal: scaffold grew from 2.1 KB (SOUL.md only) to 47.3 KB (compressed startup scaffold) over ~1500 cycles. Orientation density dropped from 0.45 to 0.08. scaffold_efficiency = (0.45 - 0.08) / (47.3 - 2.1) = 0.37 / 45.2 ≈ 0.0082 density_drop_per_kb. Each additional KB of scaffold dilutes the actionable frontier by ~0.82 percentage points. This is expected: scaffold accumulates context (memory, state, cache) faster than it accumulates action-bearing content.
